elements.label: What best describes why you're creating this project?
elements.name: projectDescriptionPill
elements.description: Select the primary motivations behind your project initiative

options.title: Business Growth
options.description: Drive revenue, expand market share, or improve business operations

options.title: Cost Reduction
options.description: Decrease expenses through improved efficiency or resource optimization

options.title: Innovation
options.description: Create something novel that doesn't currently exist in the market

options.title: Research
options.description: Gather information or test hypotheses to generate new knowledge

options.title: Education
options.description: Training, skill development, or knowledge transfer purposes

options.title: Process Improvement
options.description: Streamline existing workflows or operational procedures

options.title: Customer Experience
options.description: Enhance interactions and satisfaction for end users

options.title: Compliance
options.description: Meet regulatory requirements or industry standards

options.title: Community Benefit
options.description: Provide social value or address community needs

options.title: Data Intelligence
options.description: Leverage information for better decision making

options.title: Infrastructure Enhancement
options.description: Upgrade or establish foundational systems or platforms

options.title: Personal Development
options.description: Build skills or portfolio through practical experience
